Front: Problem: Top K Frequent Elements (Medium) | Link: https://neetcode.io/problems/top-k-elements-in-list | Trigger: return exactly k most frequent values
Back: Pattern: Frequency map + bucket sort. Aha: frequency range is 1..n, so bucket by count and collect from high to low until k items. Logic: build Counter, place nums into buckets[freq], traverse buckets backward and take first k. Edge cases: ties, k equals number of distinct values. Complexity: O(n) time, O(n) space.
